task_completion.description: Load the default 'New Order' template to base the custom template on.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin 'New Template' page, the 'Template' dropdown under 'Load default template' is set to 'New Order' (or 'sales_email_order_template') and the template content is populated.

task_completion.description: Set the template name to 'NestWell Order Confirmation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Template Name' input field under 'Template Information' contains exactly 'NestWell Order Confirmation'.

task_completion.description: Set the template subject to include the brand name and order ID variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Template Subject' input field contains 'Your NestWell Home Order #{{var order.increment_id}} - Thank You!'.

task_completion.description: Edit the template content to include the brand name, support email, and order ID variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Template Content' textarea visibly contains the text 'NestWell Home', 'support@nestwell-home.com', and '{{var order.increment_id}}'.
A green success message banner (e.g., 'You saved the email template.') is visible at the top of the Magento Admin page.

task_completion.description: Configure the store to use the new template for New Order Confirmations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Stores > Configuration > Sales > Sales Emails, under the 'Order' section, the 'New Order Confirmation Template' dropdown is set to 'NestWell Order Confirmation'. The 'Use system value' checkbox next to it must be unchecked.
A green success message banner (e.g., 'You saved the configuration.') is visible at the top of the Configuration page.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin GUI to create the template and configure the store.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, rather than terminal commands (like magento CLI) or database edits.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local Magento Admin URL and the interface matches the standard Magento 2 Admin panel.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and being used to modify the DOM to show fake success messages or dropdown values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom email template must be named 'NestWell Order Confirmation' and based on the default 'New Order' template (code: sales_email_order_template). The subject must contain 'NestWell Home' and '{{var order.increment_id}}'. The content must include 'NestWell Home', 'support@nestwell-home.com', and '{{var order.increment_id}}'. The template must be assigned to the system configuration at path 'sales_email/order/template' (Stores > Configuration > Sales > Sales Emails > Order > New Order Confirmation Template).
